message:
feat(Lib): Implement 4 Python internal utility modules

Implement CPython internal utility modules in Zig:

_colorize.zig (~341 lines):
- Full ANSI color code support (16 colors + bright variants)
- Style codes (bold, dim, italic, underline, blink, etc.)
- Fg/Bg color structs for foreground/background colors
- Color enum with conversion methods
- Theme struct for syntax highlighting (Python REPL style)
- canUseColor() detection (TTY, NO_COLOR, FORCE_COLOR, TERM)
- colorize(), stripColors() utility functions
- 256-color and RGB color support

_markupbase.zig (~458 lines):
- ParserBase for SGML/HTML/XML parsing
- ParserState enum (data, tag_open, cdata, doctype, etc.)
- ParseError with line/column tracking
- parseDeclaration() for DOCTYPE/ENTITY
- parseComment() for <!-- -->
- parseCDATA() for <![CDATA[...]]>
- parsePI() for <?...?>
- Helper functions: isWhitespace, isNameChar, parseName
- Entity resolution (lt, gt, amp, quot, etc.)

_pydatetime.zig (~372 lines):
- Date constants (DAYS_IN_MONTH, DAYS_BEFORE_MONTH)
- isLeapYear(), daysInMonth(), daysInYear()
- ymdToOrdinal(), ordinalToYmd() conversion
- dayOfWeek(), isoWeek() calculations
- hmsToSeconds(), secondsToHms() time conversion
- normalizeTimedelta() for timedelta normalization
- validateDate(), validateTime() validation
- formatUtcOffset() for timezone strings

_pylong.zig (~437 lines):
- Arbitrary precision integer operations
- Digit array arithmetic (add, sub, mul, div)
- Base conversion (decimalToDigits, digitsToDecimal)
- Hex conversion (digitsToHex)
- Comparison (compareDigitArrays)
- Bit operations (countLeadingZeros, bitLength)
- DIGIT_BITS=30, POWERS_OF_10 constants

All modules include comprehensive tests.
